justification: The diff successfully migrates javax to jakarta namespaces and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but fails to update the deprecated @SpringApplicationConfiguration annotation to @SpringBootTest in the test class, leaving a broken test setup. While it adds @DependsOnDatabaseInitialization and updates MySQL connector, it misses modernizing the test framework to JUnit 5 properly (SpringExtension is deprecated in favor of @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) which is correct but the annotation usage is outdated).
